_comment: PASS 3 — scarcity knobs that turn placement into a real choice. `maxCreatures`: soft cap on wildkin in the sanctuary (starting trio + summons). `maxDecor`: cap on placed decor. Hitting either cap shows a clear 'Sanctuary full' message — never a silent fail; remove decor (Build menu → Remove mode, 50% refund) to make room. `moveCooldownSeconds`: after a creature is assigned or moved it can't be redirected for this long, so steering is deliberate rather than instant flip-flopping. The remaining cooldown is shown in the creature's panel and above its head.
